title: Agent Object Model (AOM) Input Schema
description: Core schema for representing an interactive surface (screen, modal, panel, widget, drawer) in a task- and entity-centric JSON format for AI agents. When the surface declares agent identity requirements, the agent must include agent_id (and optionally agent_name) in the request it sends to the site when invoking an action.

automation_policy.description: Agent automation policy for this surface. forbidden = no automation; allowed = with guardrails (constrained automation); open = permissive.

aom_version.description: Version of the AOM spec this document conforms to.

surface_id.description: Stable identifier for this surface in the format app:section:screen.

surface_kind.description: Kind of surface this AOM document represents.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when this AOM document was generated (ISO 8601).

generator.description: Information about the component that generated this AOM document.

name.description: Name of the generator (browser extension, plugin, runtime).

calling_agent.description: Optional agent requesting this AOM surface. When present (e.g. echoed by the server), identifies who is calling. When the surface requires agent identity on submit, the agent MUST include agent_id (and optionally agent_name) in the action-invocation request; standard field names are agent_id and agent_name.

agent_id.description: Registry UUID or identifier for the agent.

agent_id_required.description: If true, when the agent submits a request on this site it MUST include agent_id in the request. Optional today; may become mandatory as ecosystem matures.

agent_name_required.description: If true, when the agent submits a request on this site it MUST include agent_name in the request.

primary_goal.description: One-line description of the primary purpose of this surface.

user_roles.description: Roles expected to use this surface.

app_name.description: Human-readable name of the host application.

tenant_id.description: Tenant or account identifier, if applicable.

locale.description: IETF BCP 47 language tag for the current locale.

label.description: Short human-readable label for this task.

description.description: Detailed description of what this task does.

default_action_id.description: Default action identifier for this task (optional).

input_entities.description: Names of entities required as inputs for this task.

output_entities.description: Names of entities produced or updated by this task.

entry_actions.description: Action identifiers that typically start this task.

success_conditions.description: Conditions that indicate successful completion of this task.

failure_conditions.description: Conditions that indicate failure of this task.

entities.description: Named domain entities relevant to this surface. Keys are entity names.

schema.description: Field definitions for this entity. Keys are field names.

required.description: Whether this field is required for the entity to be valid.

required_if.description: Optional conditional requirements expressed as a map of field -> value.

validation.description: Optional validation rules (pattern, min_length, max_length, custom_rule).

current.description: Current value or instance of the entity at this surface.

schema_org_type.description: Optional schema.org type this entity maps to.

actions.description: Actions that can be performed from this surface.

label.description: Short human-readable label for this action.

category.description: High-level category for this action (navigation, mutation, export).

description.description: Detailed description of what this action does.

input_entities.description: Names of entities used as inputs to this action.

output_entities.description: Names of entities that this action may create or update.

effects.description: Expected side-effects of this action, expressed in natural language.

binds_to.description: Optional binding to an external workflow or tool definition.

type.description: Type or namespace of the external binding (e.g., agents.json.workflowStep).

a2h_policy.description: Agent-to-Human (A2H) policy for this action. Overrides surface a2h when set.

state.description: State flags and values for this surface.

authenticated.description: Indicates whether the user is authenticated.

user_id.description: Identifier of the current user, if known.

workflow.description: Information about the current position within a workflow.

flags.description: Additional boolean flags describing state (e.g., read_only).

navigation.description: Navigation options available from this surface.

breadcrumbs.description: Ordered list of navigation steps leading to this surface.

neighbors.description: Other surfaces that are directly reachable from this one.

signals.description: Errors, warnings, and notifications present on this surface.

errors.description: User-visible error messages or error summaries.

notifications.description: Informational notifications presented on this surface.
